2603.24208.title: Powerful Teachers Matter: Text-Guided Multi-view Knowledge Distillation with Visual Prior Enhancement
2603.24208.paper_summary: Knowledge distillation transfers knowledge from large teacher models to smaller students for efficient inference. While existing methods primarily focus on distillation strategies, they often overlook the importance of enhancing teacher knowledge quality. In this paper, we propose Text-guided Multi-view Knowledge Distillation (TMKD), which leverages dual-modality teachers, a visual teacher and a text teacher (CLIP), to provide richer supervisory signals. Specifically, we enhance the visual teacher with multi-view inputs incorporating visual priors (edge and high-frequency features), while the text teacher generates semantic weights through prior-aware prompts to guide adaptive feature fusion. Additionally, we introduce vision-language contrastive regularization to strengthen semantic knowledge in the student model. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate that TMKD consistently improves knowledge distillation performance by up to 4.49\%, validating the effectiveness of our dual-teacher multi-view enhancement strategy. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TMKD-main-44D1.
2603.24208.paper_summary_zh: 知識蒸餾將知識從大型教師模型轉移到較小的學生模型，以實現高效推理。儘管現有的方法主要集中在蒸餾策略上，但它們往往忽略了提升教師知識質量的重要性。在本文中，我們提出了文本引導的多視角知識蒸餾（TMKD），該方法利用雙模態教師，即視覺教師和文本教師（CLIP），來提供更豐富的監督信號。具體而言，我們通過多視角輸入來增強視覺教師，這些輸入結合了視覺先驗（邊緣和高頻特徵），而文本教師則通過先驗感知提示生成語義權重，以指導自適應特徵融合。此外，我們引入了視覺-語言對比正則化，以加強學生模型中的語義知識。在五個基準上的廣泛實驗表明，TMKD始終能將知識蒸餾性能提高最多4.49\%，驗證了我們的雙教師多視角增強策略的有效性。代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TMKD-main-44D1 獲得。
2603.24208.author: Xin Zhang et.al.
2603.24208.authors: Xin Zhang, Jianyang Xu, Hao Peng, Dongjing Wang, Jingyuan Zheng, Yu Li, Yuyu Yin, Hongbo Wang
